name: DeliveryEstimate
usage_hint: Shipping estimate with countdown to cutoff time. Shows delivery date and "order within X hours" urgency message.
when_to_use: On product pages or cart to show estimated delivery. Countdown updates every minute until cutoff hour. Three variants: inline (compact), card (detailed), banner (full-width promo). Supports free shipping threshold messaging.
when_not_to_use: For international shipping with variable transit times (misleading). When you can't guarantee delivery dates. For digital products (no shipping).
anti_patterns: Setting estimatedDays without considering weekends/holidays (inaccurate dates)
Using cutoffHour in timezone that doesn't match customer location (shows wrong countdown)
Showing countdown after cutoff passes (it returns null — no message, looks broken)
